zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Dutton於1314年5月26日出生在英國爾達頓時，他的父親Hugh de Dutton37歲，母親Joan de Holland35歲。他於1334年與Eleanor Thornton在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1381年5月4日在英國英格蘭爾達頓享年66歲，埋葬在英國爾達頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Dutton于1314年5月26日出生在英国爾達頓时，他的父亲Hugh de Dutton37岁，母亲Joan de Holland35岁。他于1334年与Eleanor Thornton在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1381年5月4日在英国英格兰爾達頓享年66岁，埋葬在英国爾達頓。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Dutton was born on 26 May 1314, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, his father, Hugh de Dutton, was 37 and his mother, Joan de Holland, was 35. He married Eleanor Thornton in 1334, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 4 May 1381, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Dutton, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Dutton est né le 26 mai 1314, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Dutton, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Joan de Holland, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Thornton en 1334, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 4 mai 1381, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Dutton am 26. Mai 1314 in Dutton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Dutton 37 und seine Mutter Joan de Holland 35. Er hat 1334 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Eleanor Thornton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Mai 1381 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Dutton, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Dutton è nato il il 26 maggio 1314 nel Dutton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh de Dutton, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Holland, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Thornton nel 1334, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 4 maggio 1381, nel Dutton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Dutton, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Duttonが1314年5月26日にイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Duttonは37歳，母Joan de Hollandは35歳であった。1334年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでEleanor Thorntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1381年5月4日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで66歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアダットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Dutton(이)가 1314년 5월 26일 영국 체실르 드턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Dutton(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Holland(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1334년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Eleanor Thornton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1381년 5월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드턴에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 드턴에 묻혔다.

pt.26 May 1314–4 May 1381: 26 de maio de 1314–4 de maio de 1381
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Dutton nasceu em 26 de maio de 1314, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Dutton, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Holland, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Thornton em 1334, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de maio de 1381, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Dutton родился 26 мая 1314 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Dutton было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Holland, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Thornton в 1334 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 4 мая 1381 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия.

es.26 May 1314–4 May 1381: 26 de mayo de 1314–4 de mayo de 1381
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Dutton nació el 26 de mayo de 1314, en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Dutton, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Joan de Holland, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Eleanor Thornton en 1334, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de mayo de 1381, en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
